The '''''Radion''''' was the name of a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] transport vessel. In [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], a member of the Rodian [[Tetsu Clan]], named [[Nok (Rodian)|Nok]], used the ''Radion'' to shuttle his family off of war-torn [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. He landed on a [[U-Tendik|jungle planet]] and hid the ship within a large mountain cave. In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]] the [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza]] Rodian, [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red]], tracked his Tetsu rivals to the tropical planet and laid siege to their village. Nok ushered his family into the ''Radion'' and evacuated the planet. He brought them to the densely populated [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] on the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]' moon, [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="AHF" />
